title: Add jumps support in do while loops

features.name: do_while_loop_with_break_statement
features.description: Code should include a do while loop containing a break statement inside a while loop

features.name: do_while_loop_with_continue_statement
features.description: Code should include a do while loop containing a continue statement inside a while loop

features.name: do_while_loop_basic
features.description: Code should include a basic do while loop with increment and condition check
